query: vintage photograph with light leak streaks across edge film burn artifact lo-fi
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: light leak — film burn streaks, analog defects, motion-blur light trails, lo-fi authenticity

response.objective_caption: A large central white rectangular area surrounded by vertical pale streaks in beige and ivory tones against a predominantly dark background, suggesting a view through elongated parallel forms toward a luminous opening.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract photograph using extreme motion blur and overexposure, where vertical pale streaks frame a blown-out central white rectangle, abandoning representational clarity in favor of gestural light and dark shapes that create a dynamic, dreamlike impression.
